preview: Customer: How do I disable notifications indicated by the bell icon in upper left corner of iOS Kindle app? Agent: we would like to help in realtime! When you have a free moment, please reach out to us here

Customer: I have moved recently from Delhi to Mumbai, India permanently. However, I keep getting SMS/email about offers in Delhi. How can I change that to Mumbai? Agent: we will be happy to take a closer look. Send us a note via so our team can connect.

Customer: Premium amp when i️ have it on shuffle it turns off when the song is done and just plays in order and the repeat lights up but doesn’t repeat Agent: Hmm. Can you try restarting your device by holding the Sleep/Wake Volume Down buttons for 10 seconds? Keep us posted /
